structural_claim: Duality principles are fundamental to mathematical structure, with complementary perspectives providing complete characterizations of mathematical objects.

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Topological and algebraic invariants are fundamentally connected through characteristic classes, establishing geometric-algebraic duality
Adjunctions capture fundamental mathematical dualities where optimization problems and solutions form universal complementary patterns
Algebraic structures can be completely reconstructed from their representation categories, establishing object-representation duality
